rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION To Compel The Depositions Of The Person Most Qualified And C
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, December 2, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the depositions of the person most qualified and custodian of records of the Boeing Co. was continued to give the parties time to meet and confer in an effort to reach agreement on the scope of the deposition(s) and documents to be produced that is focused on OEM or Boeing-supplied replacement asbestos-containing parts of Boeing airplanes that it is reasonably possible that Mr. Gauger was exposed to during his career as a mechanic. If any issues remain in dispute, by 4:30pm today the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, what issues remain unresolved and then appear at the hearing at 9am tomorrow. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, December 2, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel Defendant Eaton Corporation As SII To Cutler-Hammer Inc.'s Further Responses To Written Discovery, Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted, And Requests For Sanctions. Late tentative ruling: The Court will sign an order pursuant to parties' agreement. = (220/HEK)
